name: tech-priests
title: Tech Priests
author: christopher vardeman
description: Tech-Priest logistics drones, Cogitator Stations, Machine Spirit Sanctification, ritual maintenance items, scheduler spine, station pair recovery, doctrine conversations, diegetic diagnostic GUIs, strict command hierarchy, action arbitration, dispatcher-owned acquisition/production/consecration/repair/combat-repair, logistics/construction physical access, persistent portrait assignment, Work State tabs, Machine-Spirit ledger traits, expanded priest dossiers, universal known-resource fetch, machine logistics fulfillment, runtime economy governors, movement enforcement, scan-routing, brokered runtime services, Conclave Task Auspex diagnostics, Stage 5 movement-failure/proximity repairs, separate Void Priest movement authority, direct-acquisition active-task pulse, and 0.1.632 direct-acquisition recall guard so movement-enforcement return-home orders suppress immediate ore-retarget loops while priests are being recalled.
